notes: Adds a compact, sanitized overview snapshot stored only in tmpfs and refreshed on demand in the background
Renders the simple interface immediately from a short-lived per-tab snapshot, then refreshes it without blocking the page
Invalidates the overview before mutating actions and prevents an older background read from overwriting newer state
Falls back to the existing live home_snapshot request while the first overview is warming
Does not change VPN configuration, profile switching, OAuth, Hysteria2, XRay routing or startup services
